text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I'm suuuper happy I get to go stargazing with
Ayabe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll go just about anywhere if it means snapping
some cute pics. Whether it's up in the mountains
or down by the beach!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's a little chilly, but I'm just fine! You know,
being super cute is kinda like climbing a
mountain!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, you're such a meanie! I was really looking
forward to today, you know?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That bright cluster of stars is the Andromeda
Galaxy. Can you see it looks like an oval?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The name "Andromeda" comes from a beautiful
princess in Greek mythology. She was to be
sacrificed but was saved by a hero in the end.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...You're awfully quiet now. Could you not stare
at me like that?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why is your camera out?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The stars reflecting in your eyes looked so cute.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
D-don't be stupid! Give me your phone right now,
I'm deleting that!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, pleeease! I promise I won't show anyone,
so can't I keep it? ♪
